notes.title: Parts of Speech
notes.content: Words are grouped into parts of speech such as nouns, pronouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, prepositions, conjunctions, and interjections.

flashcards.back: A noun names a person, place, thing, or idea.

quiz.question: Which word is a noun?
quiz.explanation: School is the name of a place, so it is a noun.
